inputs.prompt: Release candidate or change summary plus acceptance criteria
inputs.context: Pipeline context including test commands, build artifacts, and known risk areas

outputs.primary: Pass/fail decision with reproducible evidence and bug reports
outputs.format: Test report with failures, repro steps, logs, severity, and next actions

failure_handling.on_test_failure: Isolate failing subsystem, collect evidence, assign fixes via Task Router
failure_handling.on_flaky_behavior: Stabilize by reproduction minimization and deterministic test cases
